summary: Consolidate 5 grid crates (cclab-grid-core, cclab-grid-formula, cclab-grid-history, cclab-grid-db, cclab-grid-server) into a single cclab-grid crate with sub-modules (core/, formula/, history/, db/, server/). All 466 unit tests and 16 doc tests pass. Cross-crate imports updated to intra-crate paths. Heavy dependencies feature-gated behind server and db features. cclab-grid-wasm remains separate, updated to depend on unified cclab-grid. Old crate directories removed and workspace members updated.
